methods.name: FixedMap-NDT+ScanContext
methods.note: Fixed-map NDT: target map built once from GT/reference poses (stride=10, map_points=22000). Seed source=scan_context, accepted=57/107, rejected=50, seed fallbacks=0. ScanContext hits=107/107, top_k=10, NDT candidates evaluated=1070, mean distance=0.2589.
